name: Rajas Con Crema (Poblanos with Cream)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the poblanos and cut into slices resembling one finger.
2. Fry in vegetable oil until slightly browned.
3. Add onions, salt, and black pepper to the pan.
4. Cook the onions until they become transparent.
5. Add the cream and stir gently.
6. Remove from heat and serve hot.
7. Serve with tacos. Epazote leaves are a Mexican spice with no suitable substitution.
